using namespace std;
const int N=1e5+5;
int n,a[N];
int main()
{
	cin>>n;
	for(int i=1;i<=n;i++) cin>>a[i];
	sort(a+1,a+n+1);
	int ans=0;
	int tim=0;
	for(int i=1;i<=n;i++)
	{
		if(a[i]>=tim)
		{
			ans++;
			tim+=a[i];
		}
	}
	cout<<ans;
	return 0;
}","time":202,"memory":404,"problem":{"pid":"CF545D","title":"Queue","difficulty":2,"fullScore":100,"type":"CF"},"contest":null,"sourceCodeLength":275,"submitTime":1722847345,"language":28,"user":{"uid":1024038,"name":"lin_yna","avatar":"https://cdn.luogu.com.cn/upload/usericon/1024038.png","slogan":"rp++","badge":null,"isAdmin":false,"isBanned":false,"color":"Green","ccfLevel":5,"xcpcLevel":0,"background":""},"id":170740567,"status":12,"enableO2":false},"testCaseGroup":[[0]],"showStatus":true},"currentTitle":"R170740567","currentTheme":{"id":321387,"header":{"imagePath":"https://i.loli.net/2019/05/02/5cca6b2808d2a.jpg","color":[[94,114,228,1],[130,94,228,1]],"blur":0,"brightness":0,"degree":87,"repeat":0,"position":[100,1],"size":[-1,-1],"type":1,"__CLASS_NAME":"Luogu\DataClass\User\ThemeConfig\HeaderFooterConfig"},"sideNav":{"logoBackgroundColor":[94,114,228,1],"color":[94,114,228,1],"invertColor":true,"__CLASS_NAME":"Luogu\DataClass\User\ThemeConfig\SideNavConfig"},"footer":{"imagePath":"https://i.loli.net/2019/05/02/5cca6b2808d2a.jpg","color":[[119,149,248,1],[103,114,229,1],[85,90,191,1]],"blur":0,"brightness":0,"degree":150,"repeat":0,"position":[1,100],"size":[0,0],"type":1,"__CLASS_NAME":"Luogu\DataClass\User\ThemeConfig\HeaderFooterConfig"}},"currentTime":1782187139,"currentUser":{"followingCount":99,"followerCount":41,"ranking":11089,"eloValue":1304,"blogAddress":"https://www.luogu.com.cn/blog/asos1324/","unreadMessageCount":0,"unreadNoticeCount":0,"uid":1024038,"name":"lin_yna","avatar":"https://cdn.luogu.com.cn/upload/usericon/1024038.png","slogan":"rp++","badge":null,"isAdmin":false,"isBanned":false,"color":"Green","ccfLevel":5,"xcpcLevel":0,"background":"","verified":true}}
